message:
fix(stats): treat Closed-to-Tombstone transition as update not reopen

A tombstone is a deletion marker, not a status reopen. The previous
condition only checked `after.status != Status::Closed`, so moving from
Closed to Tombstone was counted as a reopen. Expand the guard with
`matches!` to exclude both Closed and Tombstone from the reopen path.

Also tidies import ordering (alphabetical) and tightens test comments.
Adds test_activity_counts_tombstone_transition_as_update_not_reopen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
